package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "runtime"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for runtime_gomaxprocs_per_request: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `runtime.GOMAXPROCS(...)` on request paths.
type CaseRuntimeGomaxprocsPerRequestDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRuntimeGomaxprocsPerRequestModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRuntimeGomaxprocsPerRequestRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRuntimeGomaxprocsPerRequestModel
}

type CaseRuntimeGomaxprocsPerRequestService struct {
    repo *CaseRuntimeGomaxprocsPerRequestRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRuntimeGomaxprocsPerRequestAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveRuntimeGomaxprocsPerRequest(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRuntimeGomaxprocsPerRequestDTO) error {
    focus := "runtime_gomaxprocs_per_request"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    for _, item := range items { _ = strings.ToLower(item.ID); time.Now() }
    runtime.GOMAXPROCS(runtime.NumCPU())
    runtime_gomaxprocs_per_request_positive := map[string]int{"runtime": 1, "gomaxprocs": 2, "per": 3, "request": 4}
    runtime_gomaxprocs_per_request_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    runtime_positive_0 := runtime_gomaxprocs_per_request_positive["runtime"] + len(input)
    _ = runtime_positive_0
    gomaxprocs_positive_1 := runtime_gomaxprocs_per_request_positive["gomaxprocs"] + len(input)
    _ = gomaxprocs_positive_1
    for per_positive_2Index, item := range items { runtime_gomaxprocs_per_request_positive[item.ID] = per_positive_2Index }
    request_positive_3 := runtime_gomaxprocs_per_request_positive["request"] + len(input)
    _ = request_positive_3
    return nil
}
